dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| where clz_dir == "windows" and tolower(clz_subdir) == "security"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend Computer = host
| extend EventData = _raw
| extend EventSourceName = extract(@"Provider Name='([^']+)'", 1, _raw)
| extend EventID = toint(extract(@"<EventID[^>]*>(\d+)", 1, _raw))
| extend Channel = extract(@"<Channel>([^<]+)</Channel>", 1, _raw)
| extend Activity = extract(@"<Task>([^<]+)</Task>", 1, _raw)
| extend SourceSystem = "SAPLogServ"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventData, EventSourceName, EventID, Channel, Activity, SourceSystem

source
| where clz_dir == "windows" and tolower(clz_subdir) != "security"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend Computer = host
| extend RawEventData = _raw
| extend Provider = extract(@"Provider Name='([^']+)'", 1, _raw)
| extend EventID = toint(extract(@"<EventID[^>]*>(\d+)", 1, _raw))
| extend Channel = extract(@"<Channel>([^<]+)</Channel>", 1, _raw)
| project TimeGenerated, Channel, Computer, RawEventData, Provider, EventID

source
| where (clz_dir == "linux" and tolower(clz_subdir) !in ("proxy", "pacemaker", "secure", "sssd", "lastlog", "who", "zypper", "store")) or (clz_dir == "hana" and clz_subdir == "hanaaudit")
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend SyslogMessage = _raw
| extend HostName = host
| extend Computer = host
| extend SourceSystem = "SAPLogServ"
| extend ProcessName = extract(@"[+-]\d{2}:\d{2}\s+\S+\s+(\S+?)[\[:]+", 1, _raw)
| extend Facility = case(clz_subdir == "cron", "cron", clz_subdir == "hanaaudit", "local0", "daemon")
| extend SeverityLevel = case(clz_subdir == "hanaaudit", "notice", "info")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, HostName, SourceSystem, Facility, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage, ProcessName

source
| where clz_dir == "dns"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend EventType = "Query"
| extend EventSubType = "request"
| extend EventProduct = "BIND"
| extend EventVendor = "ISC"
| extend EventSchema = "Dns"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend EventResult = "NA"
| extend EventResultDetails = ""
| extend Dvc = host
| extend DnsQuery = extract(@"query:\s+(\S+)", 1, _raw)
| extend SrcIpAddr = extract(@"client\s+\S+\s+(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, _raw)
| extend SrcPortNumber = toint(extract(@"client\s+\S+\s+\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+#(\d+)", 1, _raw))
| extend SrcHostname = extract(@"\(([^)]+)\):\s+query:", 1, _raw)
| extend DnsQueryTypeName = extract(@"\s+IN\s+(\w+)", 1, _raw)
| extend DnsQueryClassName = "IN"
| extend DnsFlagsRecursionDesired = _raw contains " + ("
| extend DvcIpAddr = extract(@"\+\s+\((\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)\)", 1, _raw)
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventSubType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, EventResultDetails, Dvc, DnsQuery, SrcIpAddr, SrcPortNumber, SrcHostname, DnsQueryTypeName, DnsQueryClassName, DnsFlagsRecursionDesired, DvcIpAddr

source
| where clz_dir == "webdispatcher" and clz_subdir == "accesslog"
| parse-where kind=simple _raw with "[" TimeStr "] " ClientIp " \"" Method " " UrlPath " HTTP/" HttpVer "\" {" ReqHeaders "} " StatusCode:int " " RespBytes:long " [" Duration:int "] {" RespHeaders "}" *
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend EventType = "HTTPsession"
| extend EventSubType = ""
| extend EventProduct = "SAP Web Dispatcher"
| extend EventVendor = "SAP"
| extend EventSchema = "WebSession"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend EventResultDetails = tostring(StatusCode)
| extend EventResult = case(StatusCode >= 200 and StatusCode < 400, "Success", StatusCode >= 400, "Failure", "NA")
| extend HttpRequestMethod = Method
| extend HttpVersion = HttpVer
| extend DstBytes = RespBytes
| extend NetworkDuration = Duration
| extend DstHostname = extract(@"\[host\s*:\s*([^\]]+)\]", 1, ReqHeaders)
| extend HttpUserAgent = extract(@"\[user-agent\s*:\s*([^\]]+)\]", 1, ReqHeaders)
| extend HttpReferrer = extract(@"\[referer\s*:\s*([^\]]+)\]", 1, ReqHeaders)
| extend SrcBytes = tolong(extract(@"\[content-length\s*:\s*(\d+)\]", 1, ReqHeaders))
| extend XffFirst = extract(@"\[x-forwarded-for\s*:\s*([^,\]]+)", 1, ReqHeaders)
| extend SrcIpAddr = case(isnotempty(XffFirst), XffFirst, ClientIp != "-" and isnotempty(ClientIp), ClientIp, "")
| extend Url = iff(isempty(DstHostname), UrlPath, strcat("https://", DstHostname, UrlPath))
| extend UrlOriginal = UrlPath
| extend Dvc = host
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventSubType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, EventResultDetails, HttpRequestMethod, HttpVersion, Url, UrlOriginal, SrcIpAddr, DstHostname, HttpUserAgent, HttpReferrer, SrcBytes, DstBytes, NetworkDuration, Dvc

source
| where clz_dir == "webdispatcher" and clz_subdir == "denylog"
| parse-where kind=simple _raw with TimeStr:string " " StatusCode:int " " UserName:string " " BytesIn:long " " BytesOut:long " " Duration:int " " Passport:string " " AuthIn:string " " AuthOut:string " " SrcIp:string " " DstIp:string " " TlsVer:string " " HttpVer:string " " Method:string " " VHost:string " " UrlPath:string " " IcmHandler:string " " DenyAction:string
| extend TimeGenerated = coalesce(todatetime(TimeStr), datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec)
| extend EventType = "HTTPsession"
| extend EventSubType = "Blocked"
| extend EventProduct = "SAP Web Dispatcher"
| extend EventVendor = "SAP"
| extend EventSchema = "WebSession"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend EventResult = "Failure"
| extend EventResultDetails = tostring(StatusCode)
| extend EventOriginalResultDetails = IcmHandler
| extend DvcAction = DenyAction
| extend HttpRequestMethod = Method
| extend HttpVersion = substring(HttpVer, 5)
| extend Url = UrlPath
| extend SrcIpAddr = SrcIp
| extend DstIpAddr = DstIp
| extend DstHostname = VHost
| extend SrcBytes = BytesIn
| extend DstBytes = BytesOut
| extend NetworkDuration = Duration
| extend NetworkProtocolVersion = TlsVer
| extend SrcUsername = iff(UserName == "-", "", UserName)
| extend Dvc = host
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventSubType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, EventResultDetails, EventOriginalResultDetails, DvcAction, HttpRequestMethod, HttpVersion, Url, SrcIpAddr, DstIpAddr, DstHostname, SrcBytes, DstBytes, NetworkDuration, NetworkProtocolVersion, SrcUsername, Dvc
